name: Venison Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Chunk of venison roast (or Roll it if its in steak Form)
2 cups Onion - Cut up (2 inches Pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a LARGE oven cooking bag in an oblong baking pan so that the bag fits inside the pan.
2. Add the venison to the bag.
3. Add all liquids, then vegetables around the meat.
4. Put mushrooms on top of everything else.
5. Sprinkle spices on top of the mushrooms.
6. Ensure there is about 1 inch of liquid in the bottom of the bag; add water or white wine if necessary.
7. Seal the bag and poke several small holes in the top to allow steam to escape.
8. Bake at 300-325°F for 3-1/2 hours. If the vegetables are chopped large, they will not overcook.
